N_P33B_PHEV_EBA_UDS_VC_20201015

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAE2F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1E2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: E2
Func Name: E-ACT-EBA_29b
